opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Spouse reports] He fell to the floor and started shaking violently 10 minutes ago, and he hasn't stopped or opened his eyes once!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Unstoppable, violent, full-body convulsions lasting over 5 minutes without waking up.

symptom_narrative.character: rhythmic, violent whole-body shaking with rigidity
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: not applicable — patient unconscious, spouse reporting
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: eyes have not opened at all, lips look blue, breathing sounds noisy/irregular, wet himself during the episode

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: ran out 3 days ago, hasn't been able to get more

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spouse present and has cleared furniture away from the patient

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: spouse terrified and wants immediate direction
